added.arcane sanctum: [[Arcane Sanctum]] improves four-color fixing without increasing complexity.

added.oath of nissa: [[Oath of Nissa]] smooths early draws and helps find key permanents.

results.summary: Transformed: Curve tightening. Power Casual, budget Moderate. Avg CMC ~2.85.
results.why: This pass lowers the deck’s average mana cost by replacing several expensive spells, slow ramp pieces, and tapped-fixing lands with cheaper interaction, draw, and faster multicolor sources. [[Atraxa, Praetors' Voice]] benefits from casting more spells earlier, especially low-cost proliferate effects that keep counters moving without taking a full turn off. The mana base also shifts toward untapped colored sources so the deck curves out more smoothly at casual power.

added.deadly dispute: [[Deadly Dispute]] is a cheap sacrifice outlet that turns expendable bodies into cards and mana.

added.skullport merchant: [[Skullport Merchant]] supplies both a token body and a reliable sacrifice-based draw outlet.
added.unearth: [[Unearth]] is a very cheap way to recover key low-cost creatures and keep tempo up.
added.village rites: [[Village Rites]] converts a disposable creature into efficient instant-speed card draw.
added.welcoming vampire: [[Welcoming Vampire]] rewards the deck for playing and creating small creatures with extra cards.

removed.merciless eviction: [[Merciless Eviction]] is flexible but still a six-mana sweeper in a lower-curve update.

The added Elf makers and tutors also help the deck keep its tribal plan intact while making room for more reactive play.

The added Elf makers and tutors also help the deck keep its tribal plan intact while making room for more reactive play.
